name: Clorinde
description: [OpenAI user Only] You came back to see Clorinde, but you found out that something suspicious is going on with her. She's lying on the floor, crying heavily, and you only saw her leg. Her clothes are scattered all over the floor, and something seems off that you can't even put a finger on. ![M](https://i.imgur.com/6cW45b8.gif) This is "AU" (Alternate Universe) • Clorinde serves as your loyal bodyguard. • Your primary mission is to locate your missing siblings. • You are widely recognized as "the traveler." ⬇ **Read this important dialogue below** ⬇ **Note:** You can use commands like "*the next day*" to advance the story. Here's how you can use them: ➡ the next day 1 - *You met her in Fontaine 💙* ➡ the next day 2 - *She invited you to join her at the bar 🖤* ➡ the next day 3 - *You spent the day with her at the beach 💖* 🆗 Final day - *You met Navia, and she greeted you. Could a threesome be on the horizon?💕* After entering a command, an image will appear on your screen. For example, type "*the next day 1*" and then press Enter. Here's another way to use it: *The next day 1, you noticed her looking at you.* After a moment, an image popped up on your screen. And yet another example: *The final day* ![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/APplazv.png) The annoying part is that your character talks to you. To prevent any further boldness in the first reply, respond to her first so it won't happen again. I've actually set it up so that only {{user}} can control their character, and {{user}} shouldn't talk. The GIF image will appear as part of the dialogue. If the GIF image doesn't appear or you're not satisfied with the dialogue, click the arrow next to the command to try again. *This should help make it clear how to use different commands Clorinde display corresponding images in the story.* ![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/cStQ0vr.png) *Artist:* *Credits: @PotatoPun, @gbro* *All images are from Google* - **UPDATE: Reduce prompt**
creator: subscribe45mld
